Gimme! Gimme! Gimme! (A Man After Midnight) - From 'Mamma Mia!' Original Motion Picture Soundtrack

sections.heading: The winner: Olivia D. takes the inaugural crown
sections.text: Olivia took Round 1 with 19 points across two submissions, and she did it the responsible way: one critically beloved jam-band staple, one Mamma Mia! moment. "Ants Marching" pulled 13 points and 6 voters — runner-up song of the week and the highest-acknowledged track on the playlist. "Gimme! Gimme! Gimme!" picked up another 6 points. Strong opening statement. Welcome to the leaderboard.

sections.heading: Song of the week: Tim McGraw, somehow
sections.text: "Something Like That" by Tim McGraw won the round at 14 points from 5 voters. Submitted by Dray E. (album: A Place In The Sun, theme connection: airtight). The barbecue stain on the white t-shirt has officially been canonized in the Fam Music League. The blind report had this pegged at "mid-to-upper, 14–20 points" — landed exactly in that range and went all the way.

sections.heading: Claire E. ran the most efficient round
sections.text: Claire submitted two songs and got both into the top 4. "Soak Up The Sun" (10 pts) and "Chicken Fried" (8 pts) — that's a 9.0 average per submission, the round's best. Wrote a heartfelt submitter comment about a sunroof, picked the most family-safe possible interpretations of the prompt, walked away with 18 points. This is what playing the meta looks like.

sections.heading: Self-snitch of the week
sections.text: Dray E. gave 0 points to "Soak Up The Sun" (a top-3 finisher) AND "Ants Marching" (a top-2 finisher) and felt the need to explain himself in the vote comments both times. He also wrote that he turned downvotes off, and immediately regretted that decision in the same breath. Self-aware. Still in third place. Most points his vote comments earned anyone: zero.

sections.heading: Tess D. would like to try a beer
sections.text: Tess gave 2 points to "Six-Pack Summer" by Phil Vassar with the following comment: "This song actually makes me wanna drink a beer!! Which is a new feeling for me!!! 🤠" The cowboy emoji is doing significant work in that sentence. We will be checking in with Tess at Round 5 to see if the feeling has resolved.

sections.heading: The shutout: Steve E. is a ghost
sections.text: 10 of 11 family members submitted. 10 of 11 voted. Steve E. did neither. Round 1 is a goose egg. The Ghost Report has its inaugural inductee. Show up, dad.

sections.heading: The blind scouting report's box score
sections.text: Going back to the blind reactions written before votes were revealed: 4 of 5 top-5 predictions hit the actual top 8, but the order was way off. Walking On Sunshine was predicted to win the round and finished 14th. Steal My Sunshine made top 5 as predicted (5th, 7 pts). Soak Up The Sun made top 5 as predicted (3rd, 10 pts). Hurricane Season was predicted top 5 — it landed 16th with 2 points (Buffett-positive family was a bad read). The biggest miss was "Ants Marching" — not on the predicted top 5 at all, finished 2nd. The model needs work.

sections.heading: Standings
sections.text: Olivia D. takes the season lead at 19 points. Claire E. is 1 point behind at 18. Dray E. third at 16. The bottom four (Tess D. 7, Mills T. 7, Mary D. 4, Mike D. 4, Gabriel M. 5) are bunched up tight. Steve E. is at 0 with 11 to go — the comeback story is right there for the taking.
